title: Two ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz, UK says, after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire
summary_full: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue.
summary_public: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue.
